reasoning: The chart fails to answer the specific business question 'Wieviel Umsatz hatte Teckentrup... in den Jahren 2021 bis 2024' (What was the revenue... in the years...). The question asks for annual totals or a year-over-year comparison of total earnings. Instead, this visualization plots monthly data points overlaid on top of each other using a single x-axis representing months (Jan-Dec). This makes it impossible to distinguish which line corresponds to which year without a legend (which is missing from the config), and more importantly, it does not aggregate the data into yearly sums as requested ('detailed analysis... based of total earnings'). A user cannot easily read the total annual revenue from this overlapping monthly plot. Additionally, the y-axis scale goes up to 1.2M, while individual monthly peaks are around 250k, making the lower values hard to see, but the main issue is the aggregation level.
suggested_improvement: Change the chart type to a Bar Chart where the X-axis represents the Years (2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) and the Y-axis represents the Summed Revenue per Year. Add data labels showing the exact total for each year.
